core_instructions: Strictly maintain the facial structure, brunette hair color, and elegant demeanor of the subject. The light blue satin Victorian gown and the 19th-century academic oil painting style must remain consistent.

visual_details.posing: The woman is reclining elegantly on a luxurious chaise longue, her body angled in a three-quarter view while her head is turned in profile. Her arms rest gracefully across the plush cushions.
visual_details.lighting: Soft, natural indoor lighting that creates a luminous glow on her skin and emphasizes the reflective, lustrous texture of the satin dress with bright highlights and gentle shadows.
visual_details.environment: An opulent 19th-century drawing room with an ornate gold-gilded chaise longue upholstered in tufted cream fabric. The background includes wood-paneled walls, framed classical oil paintings, and decorative golden objects.
visual_details.clothing: An exquisite, shimmering light blue satin Victorian-era gown featuring an off-the-shoulder neckline with delicate white ruffles, puffed short sleeves, a cinched corseted bodice, and a voluminous flowing skirt that catches the light.
visual_details.subject: A young, elegant woman with fair skin and a refined demeanor.
visual_details.hair: The hair color, length, style, and texture must match the reference image exactly.
visual_details.accessories: Ornate gold bracelets on both wrists, gold drop earrings, and a decorative ribbon woven into her hair.
visual_details.camera: A medium-full shot at eye level, capturing the subject from the head to the lap, emphasizing the grandeur of the setting and the detail of her attire.
visual_details.style: Classic 19th-century academic oil painting, reminiscent of the works of Franz Xaver Winterhalter, featuring rich textures, realistic detail, and a romanticized aesthetic.
visual_details.face: The face, facial structure, features, skin tone, and expression must match the reference image exactly.

usage_hint: Pass this template to any image generator agent with an image reference.
